name: Item Balance (Simple)
query:
select a.item_code as "Item:Link/Item:120",
	  a.item_name as "Item Name::150",
	  a.item_group as "Item Group:Link/Item Group:120",
	  a.brand as "Brand:Link/Brand:120",
	  a.description as "Description::150",
	  b.warehouse as "Warehouse:Link/Warehouse:120",
	  b.actual_qty as "Balance Qty:Float:140"
 from `tabItem` a left join `tabBin` b
 ON a.item_code = b.item_code

name: Review
query:
SELECT
  `tabQuality Action`.name as "Name:Data:200",
  `tabQuality Action`.corrective_preventive as "Action:Select/[Corrective,Preventive]:200",
  `tabQuality Action`.document_type as "Document Type:Select/[Quality Review, Quality Feedback]:200",
  `tabQuality Action`.date as "Date:Date:120",
  `tabQuality Action`.status as "Status:Select/Planned:150"
FROM
  `tabQuality Action`
WHERE
  `tabQuality Action`.document_type='Quality Review'

name: Trial Balance (Simple)
query:
select fiscal_year as "Fiscal Year:Data:80",
	company as "Company:Data:220",
	posting_date as "Posting Date:Date:100",
	account as "Account:Data:380",
	sum(debit) as "Debit:Currency:140",
	sum(credit) as "Credit:Currency:140",
	finance_book as "Finance Book:Link/Finance Book:140"
from `tabGL Entry`
where is_cancelled = 0 and company = %(company)s
group by fiscal_year, company, posting_date, account
order by fiscal_year, company, posting_date, account

name: General Expense Report (Production)
Material Request with Activities
report_script:
import frappe

def execute(filters=None):
    columns = [
        {"label": "Material Request", "fieldname": "material_request", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Material Request", "width": 180},
        {"label": "Status", "fieldname": "status", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
        {"label": "Request Date", "fieldname": "request_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 120},
        {"label": "Company", "fieldname": "company", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Company", "width": 150},
        {"label": "Activity Time", "fieldname": "activity_time", "fieldtype": "Datetime", "width": 180},
        {"label": "Activity By", "fieldname": "activity_by", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 150},
        {"label": "Activity Type", "fieldname": "activity_type", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
        {"label": "Activity Details", "fieldname": "activity_details", "fieldtype": "Text", "width": 300},
    ]

    data = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            mr.name AS material_request,
            mr.status AS status,
            mr.transaction_date AS request_date,
            mr.company AS company,
            c.creation AS activity_time,
            c.owner AS activity_by,
            c.communication_type AS activity_type,
            c.content AS activity_details
        FROM `tabMaterial Request` mr
        LEFT JOIN `tabCommunication` c
            ON c.reference_doctype = 'Material Request'
            AND c.reference_name = mr.name
        ORDER BY mr.name, c.creation
    """, as_dict=1)

    return columns, data

name: Permission
query:
SELECT
        u.name AS user,
        u.full_name AS full_name,
        ur.role AS role
    FROM
        `tabHas Role` ur
    INNER JOIN
        `tabUser` u
    ON
        ur.parent = u.name
    WHERE
        u.enabled = 1
    ORDER BY
        u.name, ur.role

name: Role Permission
query:
SELECT
    rp.role AS role,
    rp.parent AS doctype,
    rp.permlevel AS perm_level,
    rp.read AS can_read,
    rp.write AS can_write,
    rp.create AS can_create,
    rp.delete AS can_delete,
    rp.submit AS can_submit,
    rp.cancel AS can_cancel,
    rp.print AS can_print,
    rp.email AS can_email,
    rp.report AS can_report,
    rp.import AS can_import,
    rp.export AS can_export,
    rp.share AS can_share,
    rp.if_owner AS only_if_owner
FROM
    `tabDocPerm` rp
ORDER BY
    rp.role,
    rp.parent,
    rp.permlevel;

name: Doctype Query
query:
SELECT 
    module,
    name AS doctype
FROM `tabDocType`
WHERE istable = 0
ORDER BY module, name;

name: PO Number Search
query:
SELECT
    wo.name AS "Work Order:Link/Work Order:120",
    wo.production_item AS "Item:Link/Item:120",
    wo.sales_order AS "Sales Order:Link/Sales Order:120",
    soi.po_number AS "PO Number:Data:120",
    wo.status AS "Status:Data:120",
    wo.qty AS "Qty:Float:80"
FROM `tabWork Order` wo
LEFT JOIN `tabSales Order Item` soi
    ON soi.parent = wo.sales_order
    AND soi.item_code = wo.production_item
WHERE
    (%(custom_po_number)s = "" OR soi.custom_po_number = %(custom_po_number)s)
ORDER BY wo.name DESC

name: Export Work Order
query:
SELECT
    name AS "Work Order:Link/Work Order:200",
    production_item AS "Item Code:Link/Item:150",
    sales_order AS "Sales Order:Link/Sales Order:180",
    status AS "Status:Data:120"
FROM `tabWork Order`
WHERE status NOT IN ('Completed', 'Cancelled')
ORDER BY creation ASC;

name: All users
query:
SELECT
    name AS "User (Login):Link/User:220",
    email AS "Email::220",
    full_name AS "Full Name::200",
    enabled AS "Enabled:Check:80",
    last_login AS "Last Login:Datetime:180"
FROM `tabUser`
WHERE user_type = 'System User'
ORDER BY full_name

name: Doctype Access
query:
SELECT
    u.name AS "User:Link/User:220",
    u.full_name AS "Full Name::200",
    dp.parent AS "DocType::200",

    MAX(dp.read)   AS "Read:Check:60",
    MAX(dp.create) AS "Create:Check:60",
    MAX(dp.write)  AS "Write:Check:60",
    MAX(dp.submit) AS "Submit:Check:60",
    MAX(dp.cancel) AS "Cancel:Check:60",
    MAX(dp.import) AS "Import:Check:60",
    MAX(dp.export) AS "Export:Check:60",
    MAX(dp.print)  AS "Print:Check:60",
    MAX(dp.email)  AS "Email:Check:60"

FROM `tabUser` u
JOIN `tabHas Role` hr
    ON hr.parent = u.name
JOIN `tabDocPerm` dp
    ON dp.role = hr.role
WHERE
    u.user_type = 'System User'
    AND u.enabled = 1
GROUP BY
    u.name,
    dp.parent
ORDER BY
    u.full_name,
    dp.parent

name: Get Doctype
report_script:
import frappe

def execute(filters=None):
    module = filters.get("module")
    if not module:
        frappe.throw("Please select a Module.")

    data = []

    # 1. Core Doctypes in module
    doctypes = frappe.get_all(
        "DocType",
        filters={"module": module},
        fields=["name"]
    )
    for d in doctypes:
        data.append(["DocType", d.name])

    # 2. Custom Fields attached to doctypes of this module
    custom_fields = frappe.get_all(
        "Custom Field",
        filters={"module": module},
        fields=["dt"]
    )
    for c in custom_fields:
        data.append(["Custom Field", c.dt])

    # 3. Client Scripts referencing doctypes of this module
    client_scripts = frappe.get_all(
        "Client Script",
        filters={"module": module},
        fields=["dt"]
    )
    for cs in client_scripts:
        data.append(["Client Script", cs.dt])

    # 4. Server Scripts referencing doctypes
    server_scripts = frappe.get_all(
        "Server Script",
        filters={"module": module},
        fields=["reference_doctype"]
    )
    for ss in server_scripts:
        if ss.reference_doctype:
            data.append(["Server Script", ss.reference_doctype])

    # 5. Print formats
    print_formats = frappe.get_all(
        "Print Format",
        filters={"module": module},
        fields=["doc_type"]
    )
    for pf in print_formats:
        data.append(["Print Format", pf.doc_type])

    # Columns for report
    columns = [
        {"label": "Type", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 200},
        {"label": "Doctype", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 300},
    ]

    return columns, data

name: Doctype Associate
query:
SELECT
    'DocType' AS type,
    dt.name AS doctype
FROM `tabDocType` dt
WHERE dt.module = %(module)s

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'Custom Field' AS type,
    cf.dt AS doctype
FROM `tabCustom Field` cf
WHERE cf.module = %(module)s

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'Client Script' AS type,
    cs.dt AS doctype
FROM `tabClient Script` cs
WHERE cs.module = %(module)s

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'Server Script' AS type,
    ss.reference_doctype AS doctype
FROM `tabServer Script` ss
WHERE ss.module = %(module)s
  AND ss.reference_doctype IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'Print Format' AS type,
    pf.doc_type AS doctype
FROM `tabPrint Format` pf
WHERE pf.module = %(module)s
;

name: Associated Module
query:
SELECT
    name AS doctype,
    module
FROM `tabDocType`
ORDER BY module, name;

name: Basic Salary Slip Report
report MR
query:
SELECT 
    mr.name,
    mr.transaction_date,
    mri.item_code,
    mri.qty
FROM `tabMaterial Request` mr
JOIN `tabMaterial Request Item` mri
    ON mr.name = mri.parent
WHERE mr.custom_not_regular = "Yes"
AND mr.transaction_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-04-30'
AND mri.item_code = '01ML-ADHESIVE-3412';

name: Maintenance Schedules
query:
SELECT
    ms_sch.scheduled_date as "Schedule Date:Date:120",
	ms_sch.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:120",
	ms_sch.item_name as "Item Name::120",
	ms_sch.serial_no as "Serial No::120",
	ms_sch.sales_person as "Sales Person::120",
	ms.customer_name as "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
	ms.address_display as "Customer Address::120",
	ms_item.sales_order as "Sales Order:Link/Sales Order:120",
	ms.company as "Company:Link/Company:120"
	
FROM
	`tabMaintenance Schedule` ms, 
    `tabMaintenance Schedule Detail` ms_sch, 
    `tabMaintenance Schedule Item` ms_item
WHERE
	ms.name = ms_sch.parent and ms.name = ms_item.parent and ms.docstatus = 1
ORDER BY
	ms_sch.scheduled_date asc, ms_sch.item_code asc

Customers Without Any Sales Transactions
query:
SELECT
	`tabCustomer`.name as "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
	`tabCustomer`.customer_name as "Customer Name::120",
	`tabCustomer`.territory as "Territory:Link/Territory:120",
	`tabCustomer`.customer_group as "Customer Group:Link/Customer Group:120"
FROM
	`tabCustomer`
WHERE
	not exists(select name from `tabSales Invoice` where `tabCustomer`.name = `tabSales Invoice`.customer and `tabSales Invoice`.docstatus=1 limit 1)
	and not exists(select name from `tabSales Order` where `tabCustomer`.name = `tabSales Order`.customer and `tabSales Order`.docstatus=1 limit 1)

name: BOM Stock Report
query:
SELECT 
	bom_item.item_code as "Item:Link/Item:200",
	bom_item.description as "Description:Data:300",
	bom_item.qty as "Required Qty:Float:100",
	ledger.actual_qty  as "In Stock Qty:Float:100",
	FLOOR(ledger.actual_qty /bom_item.qty) as "Enough Parts to Build:Int:100"
FROM
	`tabBOM Item` AS bom_item 
	LEFT JOIN `tabBin` AS ledger	
		ON bom_item.item_code = ledger.item_code  
		AND ledger.warehouse = %(warehouse)s
WHERE
	bom_item.parent=%(bom)s

GROUP BY bom_item.item_code

name: Serial No Warranty Expiry
Issued Items Against Work Order
query:
select
    ste.work_order as "Work Order:Link/Work Order:120",
    ste.posting_date as "Issue Date:Date:140",
    ste_item.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:120",
	ste_item.description as "Description::150",
	ste_item.transfer_qty as "Qty:Float:100",
	ste_item.stock_uom as "UOM:Link/UOM:80",
	ste_item.amount as "Amount:Currency:120",
	ste_item.serial_no as "Serial No:Link/Serial No:80",
	ste_item.s_warehouse as "Source Warehouse:Link/Warehouse:120",
	ste_item.t_warehouse as "Target Warehouse:Link/Warehouse:120",
	wo.production_item as "Finished Goods:Link/Item:120", 
	ste.name as "Stock Entry:Link/Stock Entry:120",
	ste.company as "Company:Link/Company:",
	(select bin.projected_qty from `tabBin` bin 
			where  bin.item_code= ste_item.item_code and bin.warehouse= ste_item.s_warehouse) as "Projected Quantity as Source:Float:200"
from	`tabStock Entry` ste, `tabStock Entry Detail` ste_item, `tabWork Order` wo
where
	ifnull(ste.work_order, '') != '' and ste.name = ste_item.parent 
	and ste.work_order = wo.name and ste.docstatus = 1
	and ste.purpose = 'Material Transfer for Manufacture'
order by ste.posting_date, ste.work_order, ste_item.item_code

name: Open Work Orders
query:
SELECT
  `tabWork Order`.name as "Work Order:Link/Work Order:200",
  `tabWork Order`.creation as "Date:Date:120",
  `tabWork Order`.production_item as "Item:Link/Item:150",
  `tabWork Order`.qty as "To Produce:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.produced_qty as "Produced:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.company as "Company:Link/Company:"
FROM
  `tabWork Order`
WHERE
  `tabWork Order`.docstatus=1
  AND ifnull(`tabWork Order`.produced_qty,0) < `tabWork Order`.qty
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT name from `tabStock Entry` where work_order =`tabWork Order`.name)

name: Work Orders in Progress
query:
SELECT
  `tabWork Order`.name as "Work Order:Link/Work Order:200",
  `tabWork Order`.creation as "Date:Date:120",
  `tabWork Order`.production_item as "Item:Link/Item:150",
  `tabWork Order`.qty as "To Produce:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.produced_qty as "Produced:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.company as "Company:Link/Company:"
FROM
  `tabWork Order`
WHERE
  `tabWork Order`.docstatus=1
  AND `tabWork Order`.status != 'Stopped'
  AND ifnull(`tabWork Order`.produced_qty,0) < `tabWork Order`.qty
  AND EXISTS (SELECT name from `tabStock Entry` where work_order =`tabWork Order`.name)

name: Completed Work Orders
query:
SELECT
  `tabWork Order`.name as "Work Order:Link/Work Order:200",
  `tabWork Order`.creation as "Date:Date:120",
  `tabWork Order`.production_item as "Item:Link/Item:150",
  `tabWork Order`.qty as "To Produce:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.produced_qty as "Produced:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.company as "Company:Link/Company:"
FROM
  `tabWork Order`
WHERE
  `tabWork Order`.docstatus=1
  AND ifnull(`tabWork Order`.produced_qty,0) >= `tabWork Order`.qty

name: Serial No Status
Delivered Items To Be Billed
query:
select
    `tabDelivery Note`.`name` as "Delivery Note:Link/Delivery Note:120",
	`tabDelivery Note`.`customer` as "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
	`tabDelivery Note`.`customer_name` as "Customer Name::150",
	`tabDelivery Note`.`posting_date` as "Date:Date",
	`tabDelivery Note`.`project` as "Project",
	`tabDelivery Note Item`.`item_code` as "Item:Link/Item:120",
	(`tabDelivery Note Item`.`base_amount` - `tabDelivery Note Item`.`billed_amt`*ifnull(`tabDelivery Note`.conversion_rate, 1)) as "Pending Amount:Currency:110",
	`tabDelivery Note Item`.`item_name` as "Item Name::150",
	`tabDelivery Note Item`.`description` as "Description::200",
	`tabDelivery Note`.`company` as "Company:Link/Company:"
from `tabDelivery Note`, `tabDelivery Note Item`
where  
    `tabDelivery Note`.name = `tabDelivery Note Item`.parent 
    and `tabDelivery Note`.docstatus = 1 
    and `tabDelivery Note`.`status` not in ("Stopped", "Closed") 
    and `tabDelivery Note Item`.amount > 0
    and `tabDelivery Note Item`.billed_amt < `tabDelivery Note Item`.amount
order by `tabDelivery Note`.`name` desc

name: Received Items To Be Billed
query:
select
    `tabPurchase Receipt`.`name` as "Purchase Receipt:Link/Purchase Receipt:120",
    `tabPurchase Receipt`.`supplier` as "Supplier:Link/Supplier:120",
	`tabPurchase Receipt`.`supplier_name` as "Supplier Name::150",
	`tabPurchase Receipt`.`posting_date` as "Date:Date",
	`tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`project` as "Project",
	`tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`item_code` as "Item:Link/Item:120",
	(`tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`base_amount` - `tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`billed_amt`*ifnull(`tabPurchase Receipt`.conversion_rate, 1)) as "Pending Amount:Currency:110",
	`tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`item_name` as "Item Name::150",
	`tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`description` as "Description::200",
	`tabPurchase Receipt`.`company` as "Company:Link/Company:"
from `tabPurchase Receipt`, `tabPurchase Receipt Item`
where
    `tabPurchase Receipt`.name = `tabPurchase Receipt Item`.parent 
    and `tabPurchase Receipt`.docstatus = 1 
    and `tabPurchase Receipt`.status != "Closed" 
    and `tabPurchase Receipt Item`.amount > 0
    and `tabPurchase Receipt Item`.billed_amt < `tabPurchase Receipt Item`.amount
order by `tabPurchase Receipt`.`name` desc

name: Material Requests for which Supplier Quotations are not created
query:
select 
    mr.name as "Material Request:Link/Material Request:120",
    mr.transaction_date as "Date:Date:100",
	mr_item.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:120",
	mr_item.qty as "Qty:Float:100",
	mr_item.item_name as "Item Name::150",
	mr_item.description as "Description::200",
	mr.company as "Company:Link/Company:"
from
	`tabMaterial Request` mr, `tabMaterial Request Item` mr_item
where
	mr_item.parent = mr.name
	and mr.material_request_type = "Purchase"
	and mr.docstatus = 1
	and mr.status != "Stopped"
	and not exists(select name from `tabSupplier Quotation Item` where material_request=mr.name)
order by mr.transaction_date asc
report_name: Material Requests for which Supplier Quotations are not created

name: Items To Be Requested
query:
SELECT
    tabBin.item_code as "Item:Link/Item:120",
    tabBin.warehouse as "Warehouse:Link/Warehouse:120",
    tabBin.actual_qty as "Actual:Float:90",
    tabBin.indented_qty as "Requested:Float:90",
    tabBin.reserved_qty as "Reserved:Float:90",
    tabBin.ordered_qty as "Ordered:Float:90",
    tabBin.projected_qty as "Projected:Float:90"
FROM
    tabBin, tabItem
WHERE
    tabBin.item_code = tabItem.name
   AND tabBin.projected_qty < 0
ORDER BY
    tabBin.projected_qty ASC

name: Requested Items To Be Transferred
query:
select 
    mr.name as "Material Request:Link/Material Request:120",
	mr.transaction_date as "Date:Date:100",
	mr_item.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:120",
	mr_item.qty as "Qty:Float:100",
	mr_item.ordered_qty as "Transferred Qty:Float:100", 
	(mr_item.qty - ifnull(mr_item.ordered_qty, 0)) as "Qty to Transfer:Float:100",
	mr_item.item_name as "Item Name::150",
	mr_item.description as "Description::200",
	mr.company as "Company:Link/Company:"
from
	`tabMaterial Request` mr, `tabMaterial Request Item` mr_item
where
	mr_item.parent = mr.name
	and mr.material_request_type in ("Material Transfer", "Material Issue")
	and mr.docstatus = 1
	and mr.status != "Stopped"
	and ifnull(mr_item.ordered_qty, 0) < ifnull(mr_item.qty, 0)
order by mr.transaction_date asc

name: Sales Partners Commission
query:
SELECT
   sales_partner as "Sales Partner:Link / Sales Partner:220",
   sum(base_net_total) as "Invoiced Amount (Excl. Tax):Currency:220",
   sum(amount_eligible_for_commission) as "Amount Eligible for Commission:Currency:220",
   sum(total_commission) as "Total Commission:Currency:170",
   sum(total_commission)*100 / sum(amount_eligible_for_commission) as "Average Commission Rate:Percent:220"
FROM
   (
      SELECT
         sales_partner,
         base_net_total,
         total_commission,
         amount_eligible_for_commission
      FROM
         `tabSales Invoice` 
      WHERE
         docstatus = 1
         AND IFNULL(base_net_total, 0) > 0
         AND IFNULL(total_commission, 0) > 0

      UNION ALL

      SELECT
         sales_partner,
         base_net_total,
         total_commission,
         amount_eligible_for_commission
      FROM
         `tabPOS Invoice`
      WHERE
         docstatus = 1
         AND IFNULL(base_net_total, 0) > 0
         AND IFNULL(total_commission, 0) > 0
   ) AS sub
GROUP BY
   sales_partner
ORDER BY
   "Total Commission:Currency:120"
